description: Opinionated library pipeline — from API surface design to publishing

milestones.name: {prefix}: API Design
milestones.description: Public API surface definition, module structure, and core implementation

phases.name: API Surface
phases.description: Define public API, type signatures, module structure, and export boundaries

issues.title: Define {project_name} public API surface and type signatures
issues.description: Design the public-facing API: function signatures, type definitions, and module exports for {description}

issues.title: Set up module structure and exports
issues.description: Create directory layout, configure entry points (CJS/ESM), and set up barrel exports with tree-shaking support

issues.title: Create API documentation stubs
issues.description: Write JSDoc/TSDoc comments for all public APIs, generate initial API reference, and add usage examples

phases.name: Core Implementation
phases.description: Implement the core library functionality with input validation and comprehensive unit tests

issues.title: Implement core library functions
issues.description: Build the primary functions and classes that deliver {project_name}'s core value: {description}

issues.title: Add input validation and error handling
issues.description: Validate all public API inputs, throw descriptive errors, and handle edge cases without silent failures

issues.title: Write unit tests for core API
issues.description: Achieve 90%+ coverage on public API: happy paths, error cases, boundary values, and type safety

milestones.name: {prefix}: Quality
milestones.description: Expanded test coverage, edge case handling, and performance validation

phases.name: Testing & Validation
phases.description: Comprehensive test suite including edge cases, integration tests, example projects, and performance benchmarks

issues.title: Expand test coverage to edge cases
issues.description: Test unusual inputs, concurrent usage, large datasets, and failure recovery scenarios

issues.title: Add integration tests and examples
issues.description: Create integration tests that exercise the library end-to-end, plus example projects showing real-world usage

issues.title: Run performance benchmarks
issues.description: Benchmark critical paths, establish baseline metrics, and optimize hot paths if needed

milestones.name: {prefix}: Publish
milestones.description: Documentation, examples, and npm package publishing

phases.name: Documentation & Examples
phases.description: Complete API reference documentation, usage guides, example code, and contributing guidelines

issues.title: Write comprehensive API reference
issues.description: Generate full API docs from JSDoc/TSDoc, add parameter descriptions, return types, and usage examples for every public method

issues.title: Create usage examples and guides
issues.description: Write getting-started guide, common patterns cookbook, and migration guide (if replacing existing solutions)

issues.title: Add contributing guidelines
issues.description: Write CONTRIBUTING.md with development setup, code style, testing requirements, and PR process

phases.name: Publishing
phases.description: Configure package for npm, set up versioning and changelog, and publish initial release

issues.title: Configure package.json for publishing
issues.description: Set up name, version, main/module/types fields, files whitelist, engines, and peer dependencies

issues.title: Set up versioning and changelog
issues.description: Configure semantic versioning, CHANGELOG.md generation, and GitHub release creation on publish
